title: N=12 — wavʌves
summary:
“Waves and Lines, Interlocking, Interweaving, Ever Flowing, Fixed in Time"

Nadieh Bremer’s artwork wavʌves (pronounced waves) leverages the artist’s playful use of color to convey a sense of interaction. Distinct blocks combine with groups of fluid lines, suggesting the parallel creative processes and intersecting practices at the heart of the N=12. Bremer’s work is intentionally abstract and left to the viewer for interpretation.
